description.value:
A massive wooden or iron-shod club designed to deliver devastating two-handed blows. Crude but terrifyingly effective at smashing through armor and bone.

Training Levels

LevelProperties
UntrainedTwo-Handed, Heavy, Melee d6, Bludgeoning
BasicTwo-Handed, Heavy, Melee d8, Bludgeoning, Disarm, Punch, Stagger, Sunder
MasterTwo-Handed, Heavy, Melee d8, Bludgeoning, Disarm, Punch, Stagger, Sunder, Mighty Blow
Master PerkMighty Blow: the target must succeed on a CON save or suffer permanent disadvantage on all attack rolls until the damaged weapon or armor is repaired.

rmeData.masterPerk: Mighty Blow: the target must succeed on a CON save or suffer permanent disadvantage on all attack rolls until the damaged weapon or armor is repaired.
